chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1500 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections For hearing of main case 19.01.2021 Mr. Raja Hans Raj Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. A.G Sindh. === Comments have been filed by respondent No.5, which are taken on record. This petition has been filed in respect of a passage which has been allegedly encroached upon by respondent No.6. The said passage is admittedly a public property. Therefore, the petitioners ought to have availed their remedy before the Anti Encroachment Tribunal constituted under the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act, 2010. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed with no order as to costs leaving the petitioners at liberty to avail their remedy, if any, before the competent forum in accordance with law. JUDGE g JUDGE
